name: The Tor-ror of it All
author: Jo Mama
bootlegger: The Cerenovus and Gambler both wake each night*.
The Librarian and Investigator learn names, but not roles. When they die, they learn what they themselves are.
If a Player chooses someone that cannot be lawfully chosen (e.g. DA two nights in a row), they are not told to choose again. The ability does not work.
If the Golem does not have an ability anymore, their nomination does not count but is still run. Instead, the person with the highest number of eligible votes dies.
